message:
docs(providers): add capability profiles for cerebras, kimi, openrouter, qwen

Add structured provider capability profile documentation for newly
onboarded providers to support test planning and validation:

- cerebras: capability profile with API compat, feature support matrix
- kimi (moonshotai): capability profile with Moonshot AI specifics
- openrouter: both auth contract and capability profile, documenting
  the routing/fallback system and multi-provider aggregation behavior
- qwen (alibaba/dashscope): capability profile with DashScope API specifics

Each profile documents API compatibility level, authentication
requirements, supported features (streaming, tools, vision, etc.),
and provider-specific routing or configuration requirements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
